title: Big Painting Pack [LERT]
description: Changes the vanilla textures of the paintings to new popular paintings from different walks of life. From aesthetics to cartoons!
body:
![main logo](https://i.postimg.cc/ZqQq6bFF/pack.png)

**The following topics are covered:**

![logo 1](https://i.postimg.cc/mg51Bfpq/2024-01-02-23-12313124-51.png)

- Anime
- Fine arts
- Famous works
- Cartoon series
- Superheroes
- Games
- Football
- Objects
- Movies
- Minecraft

![logo long](https://i.postimg.cc/FF7qHjKB/2024-01-02-23-34-47.png)

LOOK AT THIS
![big logo 1](https://i.postimg.cc/DyJs77Jq/2024-01-02-23-24-511212.png)

The paintings were not created for the resolution of Minecraft file sizes - but works flawlessly from version 1.19 to the latest 1.21+

![logo 3](https://i.postimg.cc/JtCDZr8d/2024-01-02-23-32-11.png)

Installed like any other texture pack:
ADD ZIP ARCHIVE IN FOLDER:
Open Explorer, type %appdata% in the address bar of Explorer and press Enter.
then search:"" Roaming\.MINECRAFT\RESOURSEPACKS ""
and Activate it in the game settings.

![logo end](https://i.postimg.cc/SKRsX28x/pack2.png)
